reviews.review_title: FAST AND FUN ARCADE VR SHOOTER
reviews.review_description: JetSuit delivers a fast-paced arcade shooter experience designed specifically for VR. With intuitive controls, wave-based combat and a strong arcade vibe, it’s a fun title for players who enjoy quick action sessions and classic shooter gameplay in virtual reality.

My cousin bought it for me as he knows I love Galaga, and thought I would enjoy it.  He was right, I love it and gave me the arcade feeling and was instantly addicted.  I enjoy always trying to beat my scores, so needless to say I keep playing over and over again.  Definitely a must to have.  Highly recommend and I love the conversations between the characters and getting game tips along the way.

developer_response.body:
That’s awesome, shoutout to your cousin for the great pick! 🙌

We’re thrilled it hit that classic Galaga-style arcade feeling and got you hooked 😄 Chasing your own high score is exactly the kind of “just one more run” energy we were aiming for.

Really glad you’re enjoying the character conversations and in-game tips too; we wanted those moments to add personality while helping you push further.

Thanks so much for the recommendation and support 🚀

reviews.review_description: I went into the game not expecting much, but was pleasantly surprised when it turned out to be not only very polished, but also quite fun...think space invaders/galaga crossed with a twin stick shooter crossed with a bullet hell...simple and arcadey, but also fun and addicting giving that one more run feeling...I also liked the parts in between the levels with the banter between the characters which has some humor and 4th wall breaking, but also slides in some tips on the game in a good way...don't be afraid to give it a shot it might surprise you too...

developer_response.body:
This is wonderful to read, thank you so much! 🙌

We love that it exceeded your expectations 😄 That classic arcade blend you described is exactly what we were going for: simple to pick up, but hard to put down once the “one more run” feeling kicks in.

Glad you enjoyed the character banter too! We wanted those moments to add personality, humor, and helpful tips without slowing the pace.

Really appreciate you giving it a chance and you’re absolutely right… It might surprise more people than they expect! 🚀

reviews.review_description:
O wow, didn’t expect this. So much fun.

You have to align your controllers in the direction of those flying aliens. Eliminate them all, and collect the coins. With those coins you can upgrade your weapon.

Only thing that you have to do, is move your controllers and push your right trigger to shoot, left trigger to activate a shield. Duck to avoid there bullet.

That’s it.

developer_response.body:
Love hearing this, thank you so much! 🚀

That’s exactly the experience we were aiming for: simple to jump into, but super satisfying once you start locking onto those aliens and chaining eliminations. Glad you’re enjoying the upgrade system too, collecting coins and powering up your weapon is where things really start to get intense 😎

And yes, movement is everything, and staying mobile is the key to survival!

Really appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts. More updates and improvements are on the way! See you back in the skies! 👽🔥

reviews.review_description: I thought of it as a one-handed flight shooter like YUKI, but it is novel to use both hands. I have to position it with one hand and aim it with the other hand, but it was hard to get used to do at first. Arcade-type graphics are clean and cute. The quite fast-paced barrage shot battle proceeds smoothly. It was not easy because coins from defeating enemies are not automatically retrieved, but they must be caught by plane and collected during combat. But it is fun to collect them diligently and proceed upgrading my robot items.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the thoughtful feedback! 🙌

We’re really glad you’re enjoying the dual-hand mechanics, which can take a little time to get used to, but once it clicks, it opens up a lot of control and strategy 😄

Happy to hear you like the clean arcade style and the upgrade loop too. And yes, grabbing coins mid-combat definitely adds an extra layer of challenge!

Really appreciate you playing and sharing your experience 🚀

reviews.review_description:
So much love has been put into this game, with lots of cool attention to detail. The mech looks awesome as you dodge bullets and blast homing missiles away. A really lovely touch is how your character appears near the text bubbles and copies your movements.
The game is very fun and addicting to play. There are unlockable weapons to power you up and change your play style, different routes to take, and a scoreboard if that's your thing. It's an absolute bargain.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, this means a lot! 🙌

We’re really glad you noticed the little details, especially the mech animations and the character mirroring your movements; those touches were made with a lot of care to boost immersion.

Awesome to hear you’re enjoying the weapons, routes, and replayability too. And yes… chasing that scoreboard can get very addictive 😄

Really appreciate the support! 🚀

reviews.review_description: Oh I love that game - it got the vibe of the good old SNES days - bullethell style arcade gameplay and pretty hard - and that is a good thing. You have to be focussed to the point, dont make mistakes, and finish stages after stages. 🙂 Love it. You earn coins which you can use to get better gear. The strife to climb up the leaderboard will motivate me to get back to the game. At that price the game is a steal

developer_response.body:
This is fantastic to hear, thank you so much! 🙌

We’re huge fans of that classic SNES-era arcade vibe too, so it means a lot that it comes through. The focus, the difficulty, and that “just one more run” feeling were exactly what we were aiming for 😄

Glad you’re enjoying the progression and gear upgrades, and yes, chasing the leaderboard is where things get really intense 🔥

Really appreciate the support, especially at this price point. See you back in the game, climbing those ranks! 🚀

reviews.review_description:
I loved this game from the start, but it took me a moment to get everything that was going on, as my score was so low on my first attempts. But after some of Exxo's tips, I soon managed to get myself into the top 5 on the leaderboard, and I still have so many routes to take and weapons to try. I need to try out the Mixed Reality mode too as I saw that as an option in the settings. 

Absolute gem of a game, feels like an old school classic that has been made to work perfectly for VR. It's addictive, intense and action-packed, but the best bit is that you can play this easily from a seated position with minimal controls, and have a whole lot of fun with a ton of replay-ability!

developer_response.body:
This is such an awesome review to read — thank you! 🙌🔥

We love that you mentioned the learning curve. That “wait… what’s going on?!” moment followed by things suddenly clicking is exactly the arcade-style progression we were aiming for. Seeing you push into the Top 5 on the leaderboard after getting the hang of it is seriously impressive 👏

There’s definitely a lot of depth once you start experimenting with different routes and weapon builds, and yes, Mixed Reality mode adds a whole new layer to the experience. Would love to hear what you think once you give that a try!

Calling it an “old school classic built for VR” honestly means a lot. That tight, replayable, score-chasing arcade feel was the core vision from day one. And we’re especially happy it works well when seated, making it accessible while keeping it intense was super important to us.

Thanks again for the incredible support. Now the real question is… how high can you climb on that leaderboard? 😏🚀

reviews.review_description: So the developer reached out and wanted me to try this game.  I'm mainly a PCVR content creator but he said it's ok just play it and let me know what you think. After a couple of restarts and losing in game I was hooked to get the top score. This is a very simple yet extremely addictive shooter game.  You can't just shoot everything you have to pay attention to who strikes you first then attack to gain that top score.  It's a game that just works.  The music reminds me songs from the NES days and it fits perfectly with this style of game.  If you want a fun challenge with leaderboards then this is a perfect game for you.  Especially if you want to just pick up and play.  Great game that I would of never discovered if not for the developer reaching out.

developer_response.body:
Hello there,

Really appreciate you giving it a shot, especially given your PCVR background. Hearing that you got hooked chasing the top score is exactly the kind of arcade energy we were aiming for 😄

Love that the NES vibe came through too, that retro feel mixed with leaderboard pressure was very intentional.

Thanks again for checking it out and sharing your thoughts. Means a lot! 🚀

reviews.review_title: I don’t know what to say
reviews.review_description: Fun game, super fun. Trust me gang🥀
